title: Why Canadian Startups Struggle to Scale Past Series A
summary: Examines the funding gap that stalls Canadian companies after early traction, and how the domestic VC ecosystem compares to the US.

title: The Real Cost of Free: Fintech and the Interchange Model
summary: Breaks down how 'free' fintech products monetize through interchange and the regulatory pressure building against it.

title: Activist Investors and the Governance Pendulum
summary: Looks at how activist campaigns reshape boards and the long-running tension between shareholder rights and management.
